initiatives.name: Anarchist Black Cross Federation (ABCF)
initiatives.description: A mutual aid network coordinating support for political prisoners and prisoners of war since 1994. They organize direct assistance through their Warchest program, resource sharing, and solidarity initiatives while building networks of support through local chapters, prisoner correspondence, and community defense.

initiatives.name: Northeast Anarchist Union
initiatives.description: The Northeast Anarchist Union stands to build up our local communities and prefigure an anarchist future.
